utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all of them. Each is fully specified with relevant details: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (specific dates given), transportation (flight details and costs), accommodation (hotel name and cost), activities (two listed with names and costs), additional_services (specific service and cost), and total_budget (total cost, currency, and breakdown). Therefore, all 7 items are present and complete.
